title: × dryostichum singulare
intro: × Dryostichum singulare, a hybrid plant, is a cross between the taxonomic species Dryad's saddle (Dryopteris cupressiformis) and the Mountain Holly Fern (Dryopteris intermedia). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of × Dryostichum singulare include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
